text.title: gcp-security-iam Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gcp-security-iam as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using service account key JSON files for GKE workloads or GitHub Actions CI/CD.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Key files are long-lived credentials that can be leaked in logs, repositories, or container images. Workload Identity Federation provides short-lived tokens tied to the actual workload identity.

failure-mode.description: Enforcing VPC-SC on day one without a dry-run validation period.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VPC-SC enforcement blocks access immediately. Without dry-run analysis, legitimate API calls from pipelines, humans, and monitoring tools are silently rejected, causing hard-to-diagnose outages.
